skills.name: inspirera
skills.description: INSPIRERA — Inspect Navigated Source, Project Its Resonance, Extract Reusable Abstractions. Analyzes an external link and maps its concepts, patterns, and primitives to one of your own projects.

skills.name: profilera
skills.description: PROFILERA — PROFILing Extracted Reasoning and Attitudes. Mines session history to build an agent-consumable decision profile.

skills.name: utvecklarn
skills.description: UTVECKLARN — Autonomous vision-driven development cycles. Independently decides what to build, evolves projects, and makes structured progress on a codebase.
